theme: endurance race stint and pace planner
title: Pit-Reset Pacing: Bang-Bang Stints Under Nonconvex Tire Wear
strategies: coast at minimum intensity, never pit (trivial baseline)
best single constant pace with evenly spaced pits (greedy textbook stint)
stint-position-aware ramp: coast early / push late, pit boundaries chosen jointly via per-stint DP (strong)
true joint optimum over intensity ramps + uneven stint lengths on the wear envelope (open ceiling, uncovered)
